Class OpenAiCompatibleMessage

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractMessage
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractModelMessage<OpenAiCompatibleResponse>
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiCompatibleMessage
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class OpenAiCompatibleMessage extends OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
Implementation of OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage for the standard Chat Completions API. Handles the classic "choices" and "delta" structures used by most OpenAI-compatible providers.
Author:
anahata

    Field
    Description
    private Map<Integer, StringBuilder>
    callArgsBuffers
    Buffers for accumulating streaming tool call arguments, keyed by their index in the 'tool_calls' array.

    callIds
    Maps tool call indices to their stable API-provided unique IDs.
    private Map<Integer,String>
    callNames
    Maps tool call indices to the requested function name.

    void
    appendContent(String text)
    Appends text to the main content part or creates a new one.

    Method
    Description
    final BlobPart
    addBlobPart(String mimeType, byte[] data)
    Creates and adds a new binary data part to this message.
    final ModelBlobPart
    addBlobPart(String mimeType, byte[] data, byte[] thoughtSignature)
    Creates and adds a new model blob part with thought process metadata.

    addBlobPart(Path path)
    Creates and adds a new binary data part from a local file path.

    addTextPart(String text)
    Creates and adds a new text part to this message.

    protected void
    appendMetadata(StringBuilder sb)
    Hook for subclasses to inject specialized metadata into the message header.
    void
    appendRawJson(String chunk)
    Appends a raw JSON chunk to the existing content.
    void
    declineAllPending()
    Sets all tool calls in this message that are currently in a PENDING state to DECLINED.
    void
    executeAllPending()
    Executes all tool calls in this message that are currently in a PENDING state.
    String
    getDevice()
    Gets the ID of the device where this message was created or processed.
    String
    getFrom()
    Gets the identity of the sender of this message.
    Role
    getRole()
    Gets the role of the entity that created this message.
    List<AbstractToolCall<?,?>>
    getToolCalls()
    Filters and returns only the tool call parts from this message.
    List<AbstractToolResponse<?>>
    getToolResponses()
    Returns all tool responses associated with the tool calls in this message.
    boolean
    hasPendingTools()
    Checks if there are any tool calls with responses in a PENDING state.
    boolean
    isAutoRunnable()
    Determines if this entire batch of tool calls can be executed automatically without user intervention.
    boolean
    isEffectivelyPruned()
    Calculates the EFFECTIVE pruned state of this message.
    boolean
    isToolPromptMessage()
    Checks if this model message is the current tool prompt message for the agi.
    void
    processPendingTools()
    Processes all tool responses associated with this message that are currently in a PENDING state.
    void
    remove()
    Removes this message from the agi history.
    void
    removePart(AbstractPart part)
    Removes a part from this message and severs the bidirectional link.
    void
    setBilledCompletionTokens(int billedCompletionTokens)
    Sets the billed completion token count and fires a property change event.
    void
    setBilledPromptTokens(int billedPromptTokens)
    Sets the billed prompt token count and fires a property change event.
    void
    setFinishReason(FinishReason finishReason)
    Sets the finish reason and fires a property change event.
    void
    setGroundingMetadata(GroundingMetadata groundingMetadata)
    Sets the grounding metadata and fires a property change event.
    void
    setRawJson(String rawJson)
    Sets the raw JSON representation of the model's response and fires a property change event.

    Methods inherited from class AbstractMessage

    addPart, asText, createMetadataHeader, getDepth, getEffectiveTokenCount, getIdentityLabel, getParts, getParts, getRemainingDepth, getTokenCount, isAllPinned, isAllPruned, isAnyPinned, isEmpty, isGarbageCollectable, isPrunnableOrRemovable, pinAllParts, pruneAllParts, resetTokenCounts, setAutoAllParts, shouldCreateMetadata
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addPart(@NonNull AbstractPart part)
    Safely adds a single part to this message, establishing the bidirectional relationship and ensuring the part is fully initialized before firing property change events.
    String
    asText(boolean includePruned)
    Convenience method to get the message content as a single string, concatenating the text representation of all its parts.
    String
    createMetadataHeader()
    Creates a standardized text header containing metadata for this message.
    int
    getDepth()
    Calculates the "depth" of this message, defined as its distance from the most recent message in the agi history.
    int
    getEffectiveTokenCount()
    Calculates the total effective tokens consumed by this message, including the in-band metadata header and all of its parts.
    protected String
    getIdentityLabel()
    Returns the identity label for the metadata header (e.g., "Message ID: 12").
    List<AbstractPart>
    getParts()
    Gets an unmodifiable list of all parts in this message.
    List<AbstractPart>
    getParts(boolean includePruned)
    The definitive, encapsulated method for retrieving the parts of a message that should be sent to the model, respecting the pruning policy.
    int
    getRemainingDepth()
    Calculates the remaining depth of the message as the maximum remaining depth of all its parts.
    int
    getTokenCount(boolean includePruned)
    Calculates the total number of tokens in this message, summing the token counts of its visible parts.
    boolean
    isAllPinned()
    Checks if all parts in this message are explicitly pinned.
    boolean
    isAllPruned()
    Checks if all parts in this message are explicitly pruned.
    boolean
    isAnyPinned()
    Checks if any part in this message is explicitly pinned.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Checks if the message is empty.
    boolean
    isGarbageCollectable()
    Determines if this message is eligible for "hard pruning" (permanent removal from history).
    boolean
    isPrunnableOrRemovable()
    Checks if this message is eligible for pruning or removal.
    void
    pinAllParts()
    Pins all parts in this message.
    void
    pruneAllParts()
    Explicitly prunes all parts in this message.
    void
    resetTokenCounts()
    Resets the cached token counts on all parts contained within this message, forcing a lazy recalculation under the new selected model's tokenizer.
    void
    setAutoAllParts()
    Sets all parts in this message to AUTO.
    boolean
    shouldCreateMetadata()
    Hook for subclasses to declare if they should generate in-band metadata headers.

  • Field Details

    • callArgsBuffers

      private transient Map<Integer, StringBuilder> callArgsBuffers
      Buffers for accumulating streaming tool call arguments, keyed by their index in the 'tool_calls' array.

    • callIds

      private transient Map<Integer,String> callIds
      Maps tool call indices to their stable API-provided unique IDs.

    • callNames

      private transient Map<Integer,String> callNames
      Maps tool call indices to the requested function name.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiCompatibleMessage

      public OpenAiCompatibleMessage(Agi agi, String modelId)
      Constructs a new, empty compatible message for streaming.
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent session.
      modelId - The model ID.

    • OpenAiCompatibleMessage

      public OpenAiCompatibleMessage(Agi agi, String modelId, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode choiceNode, OpenAiCompatibleResponse response, OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle reasoningStyle, String reasoningFieldName, List<String> reasoningTags)
      Constructs a message from a final (non-streaming) choice node.
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent session.
      modelId - The model ID.
      choiceNode - The 'choice' node from the chat completion response.
      response - The parent response object.
      reasoningStyle - The strategy for thought extraction.
      reasoningFieldName - The field for thoughts (if using FIELD style).
      reasoningTags - The tags for thoughts (if using TAGS style).

  • Method Details

    • updateFromNode

      public void updateFromNode(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode choice, OpenAiCompatibleReasoningStyle reasoningStyle, String reasoningFieldName, List<String> reasoningTags)
      Updates the message content and state from a JSON node (choice, item, or event).

      Handles both streaming deltas and final message objects from the Chat Completions API.

      Specified by:
      updateFromNode in class OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
      Parameters:
      choice - The JSON node to parse.
      reasoningStyle - The strategy for extracting thoughts.
      reasoningFieldName - The field name for reasoning content (if using FIELD style).
      reasoningTags - The tags for reasoning content (if using TAGS style).

    • updateToolCall

      public void updateToolCall(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode callNode)
      Updates a single tool call from a JSON node.
      Specified by:
      updateToolCall in class OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
      Parameters:
      callNode - The JSON node containing the tool call (or delta).

    • flushToolCalls

      public void flushToolCalls()
      Flushes any buffered tool calls (used during streaming). This ensures that partial tool call arguments are fully assembled and registered in the tool manager.
      Specified by:
      flushToolCalls in class OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage
